info.title: Plex Media Server API
info.description: Machine-readable contract for the most-used endpoints of the Plex Media Server HTTP API. This spec is the single source of truth for reference documentation and future SDK generation at PlexAPI.dev.

tags.name: Server
tags.description: Server discovery, identity, and top-level status.

tags.name: Library
tags.description: Library sections and the items they contain.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Active playback sessions and transcoding status.

get.description: Returns the server's identity, including its unique Machine Identifier. This endpoint does not require authentication and is commonly used for server discovery.
Returns the server root MediaContainer, including friendly name, platform, version, and available features.
Returns all configured library sections (movies, TV shows, music, photos, etc.).

get.summary: List items in a library section
get.description: Returns all items within a specific library section. Use query parameters such as `type` and `includeCollections` to narrow results.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section, as returned by `/library/sections`.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by media type integer (e.g., 1 for movies, 2 for shows, 8 for artists).

parameters.name: includeCollections
parameters.description: Include collection items in the response.

post.description: Triggers a metadata refresh for the specified library section.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

get.description: Returns search results scoped to a single library section.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

get.description: Returns full metadata for a single item by its rating key.

parameters.name: ratingKey
parameters.description: The rating key of the item.

put.description: Updates metadata fields for an item.

parameters.name: ratingKey
parameters.description: The rating key of the item.

delete.description: Removes a metadata item from the library.

parameters.name: ratingKey
parameters.description: The rating key of the item.

get.description: Returns child items for a metadata object, such as seasons of a show or episodes of a season.

parameters.name: ratingKey
parameters.description: The rating key of the parent item.

get.description: Returns currently active playback sessions, including player state, user, and media being played.
Returns all playlists for the authenticated user.
Returns the items contained in a playlist.
Returns search results grouped by hub across all libraries.
Returns the Plex.tv account associated with the server.
Returns managed accounts configured on the server.
Returns server preference settings.

post.description: Sends a system notification to connected clients.

get.description: Returns server usage statistics.
Returns historical playback sessions.
Returns recently added, in-progress content across all libraries.
Returns recently added items across all libraries.
Returns collections within a library section.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

get.description: Returns newest items added to a library section.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

get.description: Returns unwatched items in a library section.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

get.description: Returns folder-based browsing results for a library section.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

get.description: Returns first-character groupings for a library section.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

get.description: Returns preferences for a library section.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

put.description: Updates preferences for a library section.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

get.description: Returns on-deck items for a library section.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

get.description: Returns recently added items for a library section.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

delete.description: Removes a library section from the server.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

get.description: Returns the full ancestor/descendant tree for a metadata item.

parameters.name: ratingKey
parameters.description: The rating key of the item.

get.description: Returns available poster images for a metadata item.

parameters.name: ratingKey
parameters.description: The rating key of the item.

get.description: Returns available background art for a metadata item.

parameters.name: ratingKey
parameters.description: The rating key of the item.

get.description: Returns items similar to the given metadata item.

parameters.name: ratingKey
parameters.description: The rating key of the item.

get.description: Returns the banner image for a metadata item.

parameters.name: ratingKey
parameters.description: The rating key of the item.

get.description: Returns details for a specific media part.

parameters.name: partKey
parameters.description: The key of the media part.

delete.description: Removes an item from a playlist.

parameters.name: itemKey
parameters.description: The key of the playlist item.

get.description: Returns hub search results scoped to a library section.

parameters.name: sectionKey
parameters.description: The key of the library section.

get.description: Returns promoted hub content.
Returns home screen hub content.
Returns a transcoded photo asset.
Returns a playback transcode decision.
Returns details for an active transcode session.

post.description: Reports playback progress to the server.
Updates viewing progress for an item.

get.description: Returns configured sync items.

post.description: Triggers a refresh of sync items.

plexToken.name: X-Plex-Token
plexToken.description: Plex authentication token. Obtain from https://www.plex.tv/claim/ or a signed-in Plex account. Never commit tokens to source control.

AcceptHeader.name: Accept
AcceptHeader.description: Request JSON responses by setting `application/json`. Plex defaults to XML when omitted.

machineIdentifier.description: Unique machine identifier for this server.

MediaContainerServer.description: Root wrapper for server root responses.

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp of the last server update.

ServerCapability.description: A capability or service exposed by the server root.

MediaContainerLibrarySections.description: Root wrapper for library section listings.

LibrarySection.description: A single library section (movie, show, artist, photo).

LibrarySectionLocation.description: Filesystem location backing a library section.

MediaContainerLibraryItems.description: Root wrapper for library item listings.

LibraryItems.description: Collection of items within a library section.

MediaItem.description: Base fields common to movies, episodes, tracks, and photos.

Media.description: Media container describing one or more file parts for a metadata item.

Tag.description: A tag such as a genre, director, writer, or actor.

MediaContainerMetadata.description: Root wrapper for a single metadata item response.

MediaContainerMetadataChildren.description: Root wrapper for metadata child item listings.

MediaContainerPlaylistItems.description: Root wrapper for playlist item listings.

PlaylistItems.description: Collection of items in a playlist.

HubEntry.description: A single hub grouping within a search response.

MediaContainerSessions.description: Root wrapper for active session listings.

Session.description: An active playback session, extending a media item with player and session details.

MediaContainerAccount.description: Root wrapper for Plex account response.

MediaContainerAccounts.description: Root wrapper for managed accounts response.

Preferences.description: Collection of server or section preferences.

MediaContainerTranscodeDecision.description: Root wrapper for a transcode decision.

MediaContainerTranscodeSession.description: Root wrapper for transcode session details.

TranscodeSession.description: Details of an active transcode session.
